entries.definition: relating to or based on the metric system of measurement (using metres, grams, litres, etc.)
entries.exampleSentence: Most countries use the metric system, but the US still uses imperial units like miles and pounds.

entries.definition: a standard of measurement; a specific way of measuring or evaluating something, especially performance or success
entries.exampleSentence: The company tracks several key metrics, including customer satisfaction and monthly revenue.

entries.definition: a mathematical function that defines a distance between two points in a space (technical)
entries.exampleSentence: In Euclidean geometry, the distance between two points is calculated using a simple metric.
